author: Gerardus de Piscario (Géraud du Pescher)
title: Lectura decretalium Cum Marthe
remarks: Dedicated to Pope John XXII. Amounts to a series of lessons held in Toulouse on a letter of Pope Innocent III (from 29 nov. 1202; cf. Decretales Gregorii IX, lib. III tit. 41, c. 6, ed. Friedberg Vol. II, 636-640) regarding the celebration of Mass and the Eucharist[BnF lat. 4367, ff. 2r- 51r?; Bordeaux ff. 1r-73r.]
